mapper.sql:
WHERE boardType LIKE 'faq/%'
AND boardType LIKE CONCAT('faq/', #{category1}, '/%')
mapper.select:
SELECT boardNo, memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt FROM board
ORDER BY boardNo DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT boardNo, memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt FROM board WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'faq/%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{memberUid}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{fileId}, NOW() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM board WHERE boardType LIKE 'faq/%' AND boardNo IN
#{boardNo}
